name: My Custom Theme
_about: Template for MLOX Subset Sort's Import Theme... button (Log panel). Keys starting with _ are ignored by the importer, as is any other unknown key. Colors are hex: #rrggbb or shorthand #rgb. Base16 scheme files (.yaml/.yml with base00..base0F) are also importable directly - this template is the native format.
_required: The 9 fields below MUST be present (import fails without them). They drive the log panel, and the window colours are derived from them automatically - background is lightened (dark themes) or darkened (light themes) for panels, buttons and borders.
_optional_tokens: The 7 fields below are OPTIONAL syntax-token colours for the field-diff JSON/HTML viewer (Check Conflicts -> double-click a field). Delete any or all - missing ones fall back to the required roles above (key->section, string->ok, number->warn, keyword->error, punct->dim, tag->error, attr->warn).
_optional_chrome: The chrome object below is OPTIONAL and overrides the automatic window-colour derivation. Give any subset of these 11 keys - anything missing (or invalid) is derived from background instead. Delete the whole object to use pure derivation. bg=window/frames, bg2=raised panels, field_bg=entries/lists, border=borders, fg=text, fg_dim=secondary text, select=selection, btn_bg/btn_bg_active=buttons, accent=focus highlight, log_bg=console-style panes (log, previews).
_aliases: Field-name tolerance: bg/fg work for background/foreground, selection for select, warning for warn, success/good for ok, muted/comment for dim, header/info for section, added for inserted, property for key, str/num/boolean/punctuation for their obvious fields.
